summary: Completed frontend testing of P1 baseball tracker features. All 8 requested features verified: back button navigation to /dashboard in all live game components, all 9 fielders visible on field (LF, CF, RF, SS, 2B, 3B, P, 1B, C), 3-column layout (LEFT: play-by-play + batting, CENTER: field, RIGHT: pitch results + team stats), real-time stats updates for At Bat, Pitcher, and Team Stats, no doubling of play-by-play entries, and substitution icons visible in batting order.
critical_code_review_comments: BaseballLiveGame.jsx line 1441: navigate(demoMode ? '/' : '/dashboard') - CORRECT (demo mode goes to home, logged-in goes to dashboard)
BaseballDiamond component (lines 424-436) defines all 9 fielder positions: P, C, 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, LF, CF, RF
3-column grid layout at line 1488: grid-cols-12 with col-span-3 (left), col-span-6 (center), col-span-3 (right)
TeamStatsSummary component (lines 818-866) shows H, AB, R, K, BB columns for both teams
updateBatterStats (lines 1054-1070) and updatePitcherStats (lines 1073-1089) properly update stats in real-time
Play-by-play uses addPlay() helper with lastPlayIdRef for deduplication (prevents doubling)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified working. Back buttons in LiveGame.jsx, FootballLiveGame.jsx, AdvancedLiveGame.jsx navigate to /dashboard. BaseballLiveGame.jsx navigates to / in demo mode, /dashboard when logged in. Baseball field shows all 9 fielders. Layout is 3-column: LEFT (play-by-play + batting order), CENTER (field), RIGHT (pitch buttons + team stats). Stats update in real-time when clicking pitch buttons. Play-by-play has no doubling. Substitution icons (ArrowLeftRight) visible in batting order.

back_button_navigation.notes: Code review confirms: LiveGame.jsx:1738, FootballLiveGame.jsx:2874, AdvancedLiveGame.jsx:668 all navigate to /dashboard. BaseballLiveGame.jsx:1441 navigates to / in demo mode, /dashboard otherwise.

all_9_fielders_visible.notes: Playwright test confirmed all 9 positions visible: LF, CF, RF, SS, 2B, 3B, P, 1B, C. BaseballDiamond component defines positions at lines 427-435.

3_column_layout.notes: Layout verified: LEFT (col-span-3) has Play-by-Play + Batting Order, CENTER (col-span-6) has Baseball Diamond, RIGHT (col-span-3) has Pitch Result buttons + Team Stats.

at_bat_stats_update.notes: After walk, At Bat section shows updated stats. updateBatterStats function at line 1054 handles real-time updates.

pitcher_stats_update.notes: After 4 balls, pitcher shows '4 P'. After 3 more strikes, shows '7 P, 1 K'. updatePitcherStats function at line 1073 handles updates.

team_stats_table_update.notes: TeamStatsSummary component shows H, AB, R, K, BB columns. After walk: BB=1. After strikeout: AB=1, K=1, BB=1. Updates in real-time.

play_by_play_no_doubling.notes: Clicked Ball 4 times, got exactly 4 entries (Ball 1, Ball 2, Ball 3, Walk). No duplicates. Uses lastPlayIdRef for deduplication.

substitution_icon_visible.notes: Found 9 ArrowLeftRight substitution icons in batting order section (one per player).

playwright_test_results.demo_page_load: PASS - Page loads with baseball emoji, 3-column grid, all sections visible
playwright_test_results.fielder_positions: PASS - All 9 positions found: LF, CF, RF, SS, 2B, 3B, P, 1B, C
playwright_test_results.pitch_buttons: PASS - All buttons found: Ball, Strike (L), Strike (S), Foul, In Play, HBP, IBB
playwright_test_results.stats_update_after_walk: PASS - Pitcher: 4 P, Team Stats: BB=1
playwright_test_results.stats_update_after_strikeout: PASS - Pitcher: 7 P, 1 K, Team Stats: AB=1, K=1, BB=1
